_comment: Route census — fail-closed conservation gate for the routes.ts decomposition. Update this file IN THE SAME PR/change as any route move so the diff itself proves conservation: a pure move shows `total` UNCHANGED and `routesTsInline` DECREASED. `inlineCeiling` may only ever ratchet DOWN. Counts BOTH `app.METHOD(` and `<name>Router.METHOD(` registration styles across server/routes.ts + server/routes/**; the shared draft (app.-only, mirror baseline 659) undercounted router-style modules — corrected here against the real main tree. Baseline is the test's own regex computation (authoritative gate), not an external grep.
